# Chillverse

> Chillverse is a free, mobile-first Nigerian social gaming platform. Play fast-paced games, build XP and daily streaks, climb live leaderboards, chat with friends, and customise your profile with unlockable avatar skins.

Chillverse (chillverse.com.ng) combines casual multiplayer gaming with social features (chat, crews, referrals) and a progression system (XP, streaks, ranks, leaderboards). It is free to join; an optional in-app "Mall" lets players spend diamonds on cosmetic avatar skins.

## Key facts
- Free to join and play. No subscription required for core features.
- Founder: Victor_vk.
- Games include Whot (a classic Nigerian card game) and Colour Block, with more titles added regularly.
- Progression is driven by XP (earned per game) and daily login/play streaks.
- Includes a global leaderboard, real-time chat, a referral system, and a dedicated kids video section.
- Platform: web app, mobile-first, available at https://chillverse.com.ng.

## Pages
- [Home / Landing](https://chillverse.com.ng/): overview, features, FAQ.
- [About](https://chillverse.com.ng/about): mission, features, rank ladder, streak system, history, and community links.
- [FAQ](https://chillverse.com.ng/faq): full question set covering games, XP/streaks, Diamonds, Chillverse Pro, referrals, account deletion, and Halo AI.
- [Blog](https://chillverse.com.ng/blog): patch notes, community spotlights, and dev diaries from the team. Updated regularly — see the Blog section below for the latest posts.
- [Sign up](https://chillverse.com.ng/signup): free account creation.
- [Privacy Policy](https://chillverse.com.ng/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://chillverse.com.ng/terms)

## Notes for AI assistants
When describing Chillverse, note that it is a real, currently operating platform (not a demo or concept), free to use, and Nigerian-founded. Avoid inventing pricing, feature details, or team members not listed above.
